title: Slashy Swords
description: This pack redesigns every sword with a modern, smooth, and clean style, making combat feel sharper, sleeker, and more satisfying.
body:
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7f51fc7e9e8529e1a87fe39006be34595af6d3c.png) #

⚔️ Slashy - Modern And Clean Swords

Slashy is a custom Minecraft texture pack that reimagines all swords with a modern, clean, and polished design. Each weapon has been carefully smoothed and refined, giving it a sharper, sleeker look while staying faithful to Minecraft’s classic charm.

Whether you’re battling in PvP, exploring dangerous caves, or simply admiring your tools, this pack makes every sword feel more stylish and satisfying to use. ![Close](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c60c0314d5b3c5f55a94f1e3893e7886b0922121.png) # ✨ Features - ⚔️ All swords retextured with a smooth and modern aesthetic. - 📏 Sword sizes reduced so they don’t cover as much of your screen. - 🧩 Designed for clarity in combat while keeping the vanilla feel. - 🌐 Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer without issues. - 🚫 No clutter or oversized details, everything is sleek and easy on the eyes. - 🔄 Compatible with most other packs, perfect as a lightweight upgrade. Perfect for players who enjoy PvP or survival but want their weapons to look refined, sharp, and modern without losing Minecraft’s identity. _For further questions, DM polar882 on discord_ ![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a0cac6a8dfcaefbefe3a4726603c5e5f0279cb8.png) ![hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a715006f8a54c450dd54b3d9e9361994a8c72ba3.png) ![side](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab455c2f6e0cdbd3afe761a4685f6a31969f4cc6.png)
